# 關閉帳號

To permanently close your ACME store account, log in and navigate to "Account Settings" to select the "Close Account" option, following the on-screen instructions to confirm your request. Be aware that once closed, your purchase history and personal data will be permanently deleted and this action is irreversible. Before proceeding, ensure all orders are completed, any gift card balances are used, and any subscriptions or loyalty memberships are canceled to avoid future charges. Account closure typically occurs within 48 hours, and you can contact customer service for assistance during this period.
